_note: Golden test map: file → expected outcome (+ reason codes that MUST be present). Order matters: 001 before 006 (duplicate); split series in sequence; splits 1-2 must be APPROVEd for 3 to over-bill. Outcome policy (frozen): HOLD = can't evaluate at all (extraction failure only); REJECT = evaluated, decisively wrong (dominant negative outcome); REVIEW = evaluated but genuinely soft/ambiguous (a small residual bucket); APPROVE = clean.
